content.en:
The years passed.

Ye Tian continued to use many treasures and resources to improve his strength, controlling the chains to break one by one, coupled with many resources from the different realms of the town, his half-step perfect control body and half-step perfect will were increasing rapidly.

In addition, Ye Tian is also constantly creating more top-notch perfect control skills, as well as condensing more perfect marks.

Ye Tian was confident that he could enter the Blood War City within 10,000 eternal years, and he would hit the first place on the Blood War List.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had come to the Blood War Capital and was already very close to ten thousand eternal years.

this day.

Ye Tian's half-step perfect control body finally reached the peak realm of Xiaocheng, which caused Ye Tian's strength to improve again.

And with this progress, Ye Tian's position on the blood battle list has taken a step further and he has become the first place on the blood battle list.

"The first place on the blood battle list has finally reached this position. "

Ye Tian smiled.

It only took 10,000 eternal years to achieve such progress, which can be described as too fast.

Although the half-step perfect controller in the back still had hope of surpassing him, as he continued to cultivate, the odds were too low.

......

The capital of bloody wars, somewhere to practice.

The Hidden River Controller suddenly opened his eyes and looked at the Blood Battle List.

"What, my number one spot on the blood battle list has been surpassed?"

The ruler of the river was shocked.

It didn't take long for him to become the number one on the Blood Battle List, and it only took 60,000 Eternal Years to become the first place on the Blood Battle List, crushing all those half-step perfect controllers who were close to 100,000 Eternal Ages, and he was extremely confident in his talent potential.

But now, he was suddenly surpassed.

"It's him, Ye Tian!"

The Ruler of the River frowned.

He had heard of Ye Tian before, and knew that Ye Tian had a fierce impact on the blood battle list, but he didn't care, after all, the back of the blood battle list had a fierce impact, which didn't mean that the front was also very strong.

Many half-step perfect controllers had a fierce impact in front of them, but after reaching the top ten, they couldn't rush up, and even after leaving the Blood War Capital in the 100,000 Eternal Years, they still didn't become the first on the Blood Battle List.

Under normal circumstances, it is very difficult to become the first place in the blood battle list, and in most cases, the first place reaches the time of 100,000 eternal years, and only the half-step perfect controller behind can impact the first place.

The reason why this is so is because after becoming the first place on the Blood War List, you only need to stabilize a thousand eternal years before you will get the biggest chance on the Blood War List.

And he waited for the last time when the first place left the Blood War Capital, so that he could hope to enter the first place on the Blood War List.

And now, he has obtained that great opportunity again, and his strength has improved rapidly, but in this case, he has been surpassed by Ye Tian.

"Damn, Ye Tian, can't you hit the first place later!"

The Ruler of the River said angrily.

Ye Tian became the first place, which means that he will not be able to enjoy the benefits of the first place on the blood battle list, this loss is too great!

"I have to practice as soon as possible and get the first place back!"

Said the master of the river.

And now, without the benefit of being the first on the blood battle list, he can only go to one place if he wants to improve his strength quickly.

"Misty Pupil Realm!"

The Ruler of the River knows about this place, but he has never dared to go there, because once he goes there, he risks falling.

At his level, who wants to fall!

If he practices step by step, he has almost 100% hope of becoming a perfect controller in the future!

However, he was not convinced, and he didn't want to end up in second place on the blood battle list.

So, he wanted to go to the Misty Pupil Realm and give it a try.

......

"Ye Tian has hit the first place on the blood battle list!"

The Lord of Xuanhuang was a little surprised.

Although he thought that Ye Tian could hit the first place in the blood battle list, he didn't expect it to be so fast!

And at this moment, the high-level leaders of the Blood War Capital were all boiling, and they were jealous one by one.

If Ye Tian was the half-step perfect controller under their command, they would naturally be very excited, but Ye Tian was not, Ye Tian was the half-step perfect controller of the Daoless Tower.

Of course, they wouldn't do anything to Ye Tian, after all, there was an agreement, and they could only be jealous.

For the first time, the Lord of Xuanhuang came to find Ye Tian.

"Lord of Xuanhuang!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Lord of Xuanhuang smiled and said, "Ye Tian, congratulations on becoming the number one on the Blood Battle List!"

"It's a fluke!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

"This is not a fluke!" said the Lord of Xuanhuang: "Once you become the number one on the Blood Battle List, your progress will be very fast, but under such circumstances, you still suppress the number one on the Blood Battle List." It's proof enough that your progress is too fast and your talent is too strong!"

Subsequently.

The Lord of Xuanhuang revealed: "Ye Tian, after becoming the first place on the Blood War List, as long as you insist on a thousand eternal years and not falling, there will be a big opportunity, and it is also the biggest opportunity in the Blood War Capital. "

"It's more than the chance to enter the town's other realm?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Lord of Xuanhuang said: "The Zhendao Alien Realm is indeed a rare treasure, but most of the half-step perfect controllers can only get some resources and a low-grade perfect treasure when they enter, but the future and the impact of the perfect controller will not be of much help, and for some strong people, it will not make any sense." But the reward for the first place in the blood battle list is different, it is a real chance, which is enough to make the perfect controller envious!"

"What kind of opportunity is it, please teach the Lord of Xuanhuang!"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Xuanhuang introduced: "You should know the body of perfect control, but in fact, the body of perfect control of every person in control is different, of course, we prefer to call the body of perfect control the perfect ancestor, and the perfect ancestor body is also divided into primary perfect ancestor, medium perfect ancestor, high perfect ancestor and super perfect ancestor. Even if most of the half-step Perfect Masters become Perfect Masters, their Perfect Ancestors are only Primary Perfect Ancestors and Intermediate Perfect Ancestors, and a very small number of demons can form a high-level Perfect Ancestor. And if you want to achieve a super-perfect ancestor, there is only one way, and that is to become a half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm. And if you want to become a half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm, the body of control must break the limit and step into a new realm. And this realm, at present, it is almost impossible to break it by one's own cultivation, and it must be broken with the help of a substance. "

"What substance?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Extremely Golden Liquid!"

The Lord of Xuanhuang said.

"Lord of Xuanhuang, could it be that the first place on the blood battle list can obtain the Extreme Gold Liquid?"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

"Yes!"

The Lord of Xuanhuang nodded.
